heading: Purchase of dogs or cats by research facilities prohibited except from authorized operators of auction sales and licensed dealers or exhibitors
label: 2137 Purchase of dogs or cats by research facilities prohibited except from authorized operators of auction sales and licensed dealers or exhibitors
text: It shall be unlawful for any research facility to purchase any dog or cat from any person except an operator of an auction sale subject to or a person holding a valid license as a dealer or exhibitor issued by the Secretary pursuant to this chapter unless such person is exempted from obtaining such license under .section 2142 of this titlesection 2133 of this title
notes: Amendments1970— added licensed exhibitors and operators of auction sales subject to to the enumeration of persons from whom research facilities may purchase dogs or cats.Pub. L. 91–579section 2142 of this title
Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–579section 23 of Pub. L. 91–579section 2131 of this titleDec. 24, 1970
